title: Gravitas Arcana
description: Master the laws of physics. Manipulate gravity, freeze time, reflect kinetice energy, and localized black holes.
body:
# 🌌 Gravitas Arcana

**Gravitas Arcana** is an advanced physics and magic mechanics mod. It manipulates the gravity, momentum, and collision physics of blocks, putting absolute telekinetic and spatial control into the palms of the player's hands. Stop time, reflect kinetic energy, spawn localized black holes, and surf on floating chunks of earth!

---

## Features

### Magic Orb
The foundational item of Gravitas Arcana. Throw this orb to physically tear a block from the world and turn it into a physical entity bouncing around accurately based on its material. 

### Gravity Wand
Wield the immense power of telekinesis. Look at any floating physical block and grip it tightly in mid-air. Move your camera to aim it, and right-click to unleash a deadly projectile.
Wield the immense power of telekinesis. Look at any floating physical block and grip it tightly in mid-air. Move your camera to aim it, and right-click to unleash a deadly projectile.
- Blocks held by the wand interpolate completely smoothly without visual jitter.

### Surfing
Never walk again. Empty your main hand, jump onto any physical block projectile you've spawned, and surf it through the air across the map like a true mage!

### Time Stop
Freeze the universe. Upon activating the watch, all floating blocks, thrown items, and kinetic momentum instances freeze precisely where they are. 

### Shield
A defensive jewelry ring. While inactive, it sits dormant. When activated, it projects energy that reflects incoming projectiles back at high velocity.

### Black Hole
The ultimate crowd control. Throwing this sphere rips all structural blocks around the impact zone, creating a massive swirling vortex that traps entities. 

---

## Recipes

| Item | Recipe Diagram | Description |
|---|---|---|
| **Magic Orb** | `Amethyst / Gold / Pearl` | 2x Gold Ingot, 2x Amethyst Shard, 1x Ender Pearl |
| **Gravity Wand** | `Orb / Sticks` | 1x Magic Orb, 2x Stick |
| **Time Watch** | `Clock / Gold / Redstone` | 1x Clock, 1x Redstone Dust, 5x Gold Ingot |
| **Kinetic Shield** | `Shield / Iron / Amethyst` | 1x Vanilla Shield, 1x Amethyst Shard, 5x Iron Ingot |
| **Black Hole Bomb** | `Obsidian / Pearl` | 8x Obsidian, 1x Ender Pearl |

## Technical
Gravitas Arcana features a **100% Server-Authoritative** physics loop carefully injected with custom client-side lerp (Linear Interpolation) mechanics to eliminate natively-occurring Minecraft projection jitters. 

### Installation
1. Install your preferred Modloader.
2. Download the mod and drop the JAR file into your `/mods` folder.
3. Enjoy your spatial mastery!

---

> *"Gravity is not a force; it is a manifestation of warped spacetime... and now, it's a weapon."*
